data.description: Iraq's Electricity Ministry Spokesperson: Outage of the electrical grid in the country resulted from a technical issue caused by a sudden drop in gas supplies feeding the Rumaila gas-fired power plant in Basra.

data.title: Canadian General Investments reports NAV of $86.97 on Feb 28, 2026, with year-to-date and 12-month returns of 8.2% and 29.9%, compared to S&P/TSX Composite Index at 8.6% and 38.8%.
data.description: In Toronto, Canada, as of February 28, 2026, Canadian General Investments, Limited (CGI) disclosed an unaudited net asset value per share (NAV) of $86.97. This resulted in year-to-date and 12-month NAV returns, factoring in dividend reinvestment, of 8.2% and 29.9%, respectively. In comparison, the benchmark S&P/TSX Composite Index achieved returns of 8.6% and 38.8% on a total return basis for the corresponding periods. The company is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX:CGI) and the London Stock Exchange (LSE: CGI).

data.title: Morgan Stanley files for Bitcoin ETF using Coinbase and BNY as custodians, plans to hold Bitcoin directly in offline cold storage.
data.description: Morgan Stanley, listed as MS on NYSE, has made moves to enter the crypto market by submitting an S-1 form to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission to introduce the Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust. This trust, a spot ETF, will principally hold Bitcoin (BTC). The plan involves utilizing Coinbase and Bank of New York Mellon (BNY) as custodians for Bitcoin, with the majority stored in offline cold storage. During share creations and redemptions, a portion of BTC may be temporarily placed in trading wallets. Custody insurance details are yet to be disclosed.

data.title: Lagunitas collaborates with female tattoo artists for Women's Day, funds free tattoos for fans.
data.description: In celebration of International Women's Day, Lagunitas Brewing Company in Petaluma, California, announced on March 4th, 2026, that they will be funding free tattoos for their fans. The initiative is inspired by their iconic Little Sumpin' Sumpin' Can Art. The company is collaborating with female tattoo artists from various locations across the country to promote self-expression.

data.title: DIA 2026 Global Annual Meeting in Philadelphia to feature new programming, innovation platform, and daily plenaries, transforming the experience for life sciences professionals.
data.description: In June, the city of Philadelphia will be hosting a groundbreaking event featuring exciting new programming and an innovative platform, attracting industry professionals worldwide. DIA, a renowned global non-profit organization for life sciences, is spearheading this transformation with daily sessions and plenaries. The event promises to offer an unparalleled experience, with an estimated attendance of thousands of professionals and experts coming together to explore the latest advancements in the field.

data.title: Bob Miller, CEO of One10 LLC, appoints Drew Carter as President & CEO, as part of growth strategy.
data.description: One10 LLC, based in Minneapolis, a key player in motivation science-centered performance solutions, disclosed that Drew Carter is now the President and CEO after a thorough planning phase spanning several years. Drew Carter assumes the positions as part of a leadership transition in line with the company's growth plan and vision for the year 2030. The shift in leadership comes after the former CEO, Bob Miller, led a collaborative strategic planning initiative with the company's Board of Directors. Under this restructuring, Bob Miller will move into a different role within the company.

data.title: Create Music Group completes $450M fundraising at $2.2B valuation, as per corrected news release dated 04-Mar-2026.
data.description: Create Music Group has successfully raised $450 million, reaching a valuation of $2.2 billion. The fundraise was completed on March 4, 2026. This information was clarified by Create Music Group in a recent news release. Additional details regarding this development can be found at the end of the article.

data.title: Mark Farrah Associates analyzed the 2024 Medical Loss Ratio report, highlighting rebate results for customers.
data.description: A report from the 2024 HHS indicated by MFA in Pittsburgh highlighted findings regarding the MLR and linked rebates for customers.

data.title: Sanity launches AI Content Operating System for enterprises facing AI challenges; designed for structured data and relationships.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in San Francisco, it was reported that the majority of enterprise teams face challenges when implementing AI technology, not due to AI limitations but because the underlying content foundation, which consists of page-based systems storing blobs, is not suitable for the current era. AI requires a foundation with structure, relationships, governance, and other essential elements for successful integration. This issue is hindering the progress of many businesses as they try to leverage AI capabilities.

data.title: Ex-Seoul cop who investigated crypto crime gets 6-year jail term for accepting bribes.
data.description: A Seoul ex-police officer who oversaw crypto crime investigations has been handed a six-year prison term for bribery.

data.title: Info-Tech Research Group enhances leadership amid growing demand for outcome-focused advisory; adapting to market challenges.
data.description: As organizations face economic pressures and increased demands for measurable value, many are reevaluating their longstanding advisory partnerships. In response to this evolving market landscape, Info-Tech Research Group is reinforcing its leadership team to enhance its focus on execution. This move reflects the need for companies to adapt to growing complexity and the importance of staying competitive.
